codeReview.summary: The change correctly routes seeded-bootstrap /coins/markets price-change expansion fields through a dedicated null-mapping helper, so requested in-currency percentage fields now stay null in degraded fallback. The updated stale-data regression covers the reported leak for price_change_percentage_24h_in_currency while preserving healthy-path behavior.

summary: Reviewed the feature handoff, transcript skeleton, runtime-provider-worker skill, and commit 4fb3d07. The implementation matches the feature requirements: seeded-bootstrap degraded /coins/markets rows now null requested in-currency price-change fields consistently, and the regression explicitly proves price_change_percentage_24h_in_currency does not leak a fresh-looking value during fallback. No blocking or non-blocking issues were found.
